author: dlaporte
releaseNotes: Major cleanup: dropped ~660 lines of nest-manager-derived scaffolding (automation eval, execution history, per-app disable, enableOauth hack). Tile page rewritten with minimal inline CSS — external dependencies reduced from 11 to 2 (Bootstrap CDN + tank images in this repo). Drops tonesto7/nest-manager assets, FontAwesome, FlowType, clipboard.js, vex, Swiper, Google Charts, Google Fonts, normalize.css, hamburgers.css.
